_comment: All trades + EOD snapshots. The day_0_baseline is the starting reference for cumulative P&L math. Each EOD snapshot under daily_snapshots is required for next-day day-over-day calculations.

daily_snapshots.notes: Week 3 Day 5 (Friday). FIRST EOD with a live position. GOOGL 51 sh @ $387.07 (filled 5/20 09:51 ET) closing the week at $382.01, unrealized -$258.06 (-1.31%). Daily P&L -$288.14 (-0.29%) — daily loss cap (-2%) NOT hit. -7% manual cut trigger ($359.98) NOT hit. 10% trailing-stop GTC (e0b8fbda) active and verified. 0 day trades, daytrade_count 0. Process gap reconciled this routine: the GOOGL entry (5/20) was never written to trade_log.json by the market-open execution routine that filled it — trades[] was empty and weekly_trade_count week_starting_2026-05-18 read 0. Both corrected at this EOD; logged to learnings.md as a process gap. Continuity gap: no routines and no journal ran on 2026-05-21 (cloud scheduler still unreliable — recurring theme since Week 2). Posture 🟢 GREEN — SPY $745.28 > SMA 20 $731.52 > SMA 50 $696.62; strong post-NVDA-earnings tech rally (SPY +~1.5% from 5/20, QQQ RSI 71.3 overbought). GOOGL diverged DOWN from the broad tape — post-I/O 'sell the news' continued; price now below SMA 20 ($385.43), MACD hist -3.60, Stoch K 0.87 (extreme oversold). MSFT half-trigger STALED today (stale-by 5/22 EOD per ADR-0004 — MACD cross never fired; histogram -0.36, still negative). Weekly review follows at 4:30 PM ET.

summary._comment: total_trades counts entries placed; wins/losses/win_rate/best/worst track CLOSED trades only. GOOGL is open — counts toward total_trades but not yet to win/loss.
